overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting a player slowly exploring the exterior of a rural house at night. The footage shows a continuous slow pan around the property perimeter, featuring a wooden picket fence, overgrown vegetation, and a two-story house illuminated by dim moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown rural yard with wooden fence surrounding a house

agents.ego_description: slowly circling the perimeter of the rural house, cautiously surveying the dark surroundings and fence line

entered.detail: two-story traditional wooden house with chimney, partially illuminated by moonlight against the dark sky
weathered wooden picket fence running along the property perimeter with broken sections
tall silhouetted tree with spreading branches partially obscuring the house
dense green shrubbery and tall grass in the foreground
small wooden outbuilding visible behind the main house to the right
reddish moon visible in the night sky above the house

segments.scene_description: The player begins facing a rural house at night and slowly turns right, walking along the wooden fence line. The two-story house remains visible on the left while the camera reveals an overgrown yard, a small outbuilding, and eventually a reddish moon in the night sky. The environment is quiet and empty, with only the sound of footsteps implied by the movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a focused view of a rural house and expands to reveal the desolate surroundings of the property under a nocturnal sky. It begins facing the two-story residence before slowly panning right to track along the line of a wooden picket fence. As the camera moves, the house recedes to the left, gradually uncovering an overgrown yard and a small, weathered outbuilding. The perspective then shifts upward and outward, finally revealing a reddish moon hanging in the quiet, empty night sky.
